brand_voice.summary: The brand voice of @riyadhfood is informative and casual, appealing to food enthusiasts in Riyadh. It combines playful and celebratory tones, making food exploration engaging and accessible.

strategic_gaps: Increase engagement through interactive content such as polls or questions in captions.
Incorporate more video content to leverage the growing trend of video consumption on social media.
ogz_recommendation: OGZ would recommend enhancing the visual storytelling by incorporating more dynamic video content to complement the strong image posts. Additionally, utilizing user-generated content could foster community engagement and showcase authentic experiences.
